< Home >

Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.TokenResponse

<para> Represents the Oauth2 response. </para> <para> The property names match the oauth2 specification </para>

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
access_token

The accesstoken that's used for calling API

 string

None.
token_type

The token type. Refer to OAuth2 specs for more detailed information

 string

None.
expires_in

Seconds until expiry of the access token

 integer

None.
refresh_token

The refresh_token, used for getting a new access token and refresh token pair after expiry.

 string

None.
